summary: Implemented US-016: PNG export and shareable preset URLs. Created `src/domain/presetUrl.ts` with pure `parsePresetFromUrl`/`buildPresetUrl` functions, `src/ui/pngExport.ts` with Save PNG button using `canvas.toBlob`, and `src/ui/shareUrl.ts` with Share button (clipboard API + graceful fallback) and `history.replaceState` on preset changes. Updated `src/main.ts` to parse `?preset=` from URL on load and wire up new UI modules. Updated `src/ui/presetSelector.ts` to accept and activate an initial preset from URL. Fixed test lint issue in `pngExport.test.ts` (unused param, missing `unstubAllGlobals`). Added ADR-016. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 393 unit tests, 64 e2e tests.
